reason_for_decision: Deep, technically coherent, and strong at connecting urban geometry to bearing trustworthiness.
strengths: Explains multipath as a propagation and siting problem before treating it as a software or algorithm problem.
Gives strong deployment value through sector-bias framing, local-scattering examples, and validation logic.
Keeps the article useful to technical buyers and operators by distinguishing stable bearings from trustworthy bearings.
summary_assessment: A high-quality technical article with strong depth, clear urban deployment logic, and unusually good decision value around diagnosing and mitigating RF bearing error.
